Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const rows=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT e.* FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr' LIMIT 9\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const total=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\); const junk=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr' AND \(e.text_target LIKE 'Phrase exemple %' OR e.text_en LIKE 'Example sentence %'\)\\"\).get\(\); console.log\('total fr:',total,'junk:',junk\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const rows=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT DISTINCT text_target FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr' LIMIT 30\\"\).all\(\); rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.text_target\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const stmt=db.prepare\(\\"DELETE FROM examples WHERE item_type='grammar_structure' AND item_id IN \(SELECT id FROM grammar_structures WHERE language='fr'\) AND \(text_en LIKE 'Example sentence %' OR text_target LIKE 'Phrase exemple %'\)\\"\); const r=stmt.run\(\); console.log\('deleted:',r.changes\); const remain=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\); console.log\('remaining fr:',remain.c\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const rows=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT text_target,COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr' AND \(text_target LIKE '%exemple%' OR text_target LIKE '%phrase%' OR text_target LIKE '%règle%' OR text_target LIKE '%practice%'\) GROUP BY text_target\\"\).all\(\); rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.c,r.text_target\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const stmt=db.prepare\(\\"DELETE FROM examples WHERE item_type='grammar_structure' AND item_id IN \(SELECT id FROM grammar_structures WHERE language='fr'\) AND text_target IN \('Exemple final pour practice.','La phrase montre la règle.','Un autre exemple ici.'\)\\"\); const r=stmt.run\(\); console.log\('deleted:',r.changes\); const remain=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\); const struct_with_examples=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT item_id\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\); console.log\('remaining fr examples:',remain.c,'structures with examples:',struct_with_examples.c,'/ 403'\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const en=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT gs.language, COUNT\(e.id\) c FROM grammar_structures gs LEFT JOIN examples e ON e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND e.item_id=gs.id GROUP BY gs.language\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(en\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); const en=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, structure_label FROM grammar_structures WHERE language='en' LIMIT 3\\"\).all\(\); en.forEach\(s=>{const ex=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, text_en, text_target FROM examples WHERE item_type='grammar_structure' AND item_id=? ORDER BY example_index\\"\).all\(s.id\); console.log\('STRUCT',s.id,s.structure_label\); ex.forEach\(e=>console.log\('  ',e.text_en,'|',e.text_target\)\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); console.log\('vocab_words by lang:',db.prepare\('SELECT language,COUNT\(*\) c FROM vocabulary_words GROUP BY language'\).all\(\)\); console.log\('cols:',db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(vocabulary_words\)'\).all\(\).map\(c=>c.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('chunks_v1.db'\); console.log\('grammar fr:',db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM grammar_structures WHERE language='fr'\\"\).get\(\)\); console.log\('examples chunk fr:',db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN chunks c ON c.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='chunk' AND c.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\)\); console.log\('examples grammar fr:',db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM examples e JOIN grammar_structures gs ON gs.id=e.item_id WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND gs.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\)\); console.log\('grammar fr WITH examples:',db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT gs.id\) c FROM grammar_structures gs JOIN examples e ON e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND e.item_id=gs.id WHERE gs.language='fr'\\"\).get\(\)\); console.log\('sample 3 grammar fr w/o examples:',db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, structure_label FROM grammar_structures gs WHERE language='fr' AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM examples e WHERE e.item_type='grammar_structure' AND e.item_id=gs.id\) LIMIT 3\\"\).all\(\)\);")

PowerShell($dest = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\rtk"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; $zip = "$env:TEMP\\rtk.zip"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v0.39.0/rtk-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip" -OutFile $zip; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Remove-Item $zip; Get-ChildItem $dest)

PowerShell($rtkDir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\rtk"; $current = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\); if \($current -split ';' -contains $rtkDir\) { Write-Output "Already in user PATH" } else { $new = if \($current\) { "$current;$rtkDir" } else { $rtkDir }; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", $new, "User"\); Write-Output "Added: $rtkDir" }; $env:Path = "$env:Path;$rtkDir"; & "$rtkDir\\rtk.exe" --version)
